website.title: About | Chirpz AI
website.description: Chirpz AI is an applied AI lab building products and publishing research in agent engineering. We build the tools that make AI agents reliable, observable, and production-ready.
website.text_excerpt: About | Chirpz AI chirpz ai About GitHub about Chirpz AI is an applied AI lab. We build products and we publish research, and the two feed each other. Our thesis AI agents are the next paradigm of software, but the engineering tooling hasn't caught up. Agents fail in unexpected ways, at unexpected times. They are fundamentally different from both traditional software and standalone LLMs — they require a new set of tools for tracing, evaluation, and monitoring. We started because we couldn't find a tool that treated agent observability as a first-class concern. The gap between prototype and production is where we live. We're building the engineering layer so teams can ship agents with confidence instead of crossing their fingers. This is a long race. Many companies will try, in many shapes. We are patient, we ship quickly, and we measure ourselves on whether agents built on our tools fail less and matter more. Our product Our product is PandaProbe , an open-source agent engineering platform. Traces, evals, and monitoring — everything you need to debug, evaluate, and improve AI agents in production. No meditation experience needed. Box Breathing Try free online → Try Box Breathing free in your browser → Box Breathing Try free online → Experience Calm in Action How It Actually Works Here's what most people don't know: Your autonomic nervous system has two modes: → Sympathetic (fight-or-flight, stress, panic) → Parasympathetic (rest-and-digest, calm, recovery) You can't THINK your way from stressed to calm. But you CAN breathe your way there. The Science: When you exhale longer than you inhale, you activate your vagus nerve . The vagus nerve is the direct control line to your parasympathetic system. Longer exhale = signal to calm down = your body obeys. Within 90 seconds, your heart rate drops 10-15 BPM. That's not meditation. That's measurable physiology. Box Breathing forces this pattern: 4 seconds each → 4 seconds IN (through nose) → 4 seconds HOLD → 4 seconds OUT (through mouth) → 4 seconds HOLD → Repeat 4-6 cycles The symmetry synchronizes your nervous system. Navy SEALs use this before combat missions. ER doctors use it between traumas. Now it's on your phone. What You Get Real benefits that fit into your actual life, not vague wellness promises One-Tap Zen Button Panic hitting? Don't think. Just tap. Built on a hybrid architecture, LFM2 delivers 200% faster decode and prefill performance than Qwen3 and Gemma 3 on CPU. It also significantly outperforms models in each size class on instruction-following and function calling—the core capabilities that make LLMs reliable for building AI agents.
